title: Good Night - Sleeping Effects
description: Sleep smarter. Wake up empowered. Your bed is no longer just comfort — it’s your next power source in Minecraft.
body:
Zeio's Sleep Effects transforms sleep from a simple mechanic into a dynamic reward system that reacts to your condition, environment, and surroundings when you wake.

⚡ Sleep during a thunderstorm to gain Strength
🍖 Go to bed with a full stomach to receive Regeneration
🛡️ Rest at full health to earn Resistance
💡 Sleep in a well-lit area for a Speed boost

But that’s just the beginning…

🔥 Place a Campfire nearby for Fire Resistance
📚 Add Bookshelves for Bonus XP
🎵 A Jukebox grants Luck
🌸 Surround your bed with flowers for Gentle Healing

🐺 A tamed Cat or Wolf sleeping beside you grants Extra Health Boost
🌧️ Rain provides cozy Saturation
⛏️ Sleeping underground rewards you with Haste for mining
🔷 A nearby Beacon extends all buff durations even further

⚠️ But be warned…
Sleeping in full armor gives Slowness — comfort matters.

🎛️ Fully configurable:

Toggle any feature on or off

Adjust buff durations

Modify Beacon bonus time

Customize detection radius for nearby blocks

All through a simple config file.

🧩 Available for: NeoForge — Forge — Fabric — Quilt
📦 Compatible with: 1.20.1 → 1.21.11

Sleep is no longer just skipping the night — it's a strategic choice.
